hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|git\s+clean\s+-f"; then echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected. Ask the user for confirmation first." >&2; exit 2; fi'
bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.tsx?$"; then cd "c:/Users/ccocu/Desktop/TRAVELLINIWITHUS" && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | tail -20; fi'
